B2B Campaign - Canva Brief

Canva design brief for the HeyZack B2B property management campaign deck

Canva Design Brief: HeyZack B2B Campaign Deck

Project Overview

Project: Property Management Sales Deck Client: HeyZack Slides: 15 Format: 16:9 (1920x1080) Style: Professional, consultative, ROI-focused

Brand Kit

Colors

NameHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Headlines, trust
Primary Pink#E82F89Savings numbers, CTAs
Black#2E2D2CBody text
Light Grey#E9EDEFBackgrounds
White#FFFFFFMain backgrounds
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Title/closing slides

Typography

ElementFontWeightSize
HeadlinesPoppinsBold48-64px
SubheadsPoppinsSemiBold32-40px
BodyInterRegular18-24px
SavingsPoppinsExtraBold72-96px

Slide Specifications

Slide 1: Title

Background: Gradient (#243984 → #E82F89) Content:

  • Logo (white)
  • “HeyZack for Property Management” (64px, white)
  • “AI-Powered Building Automation That Delivers ROI” (32px, white) Visual: Subtle building silhouette overlay

Slide 2: Pain Points

Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “We Know Your Pain Points” (#243984)
  • 5 pain point cards with icons:
    • 🔧 Vendor Dependency
    • 📱 App Chaos
    • 💸 Energy Waste
    • 😤 Tenant Complaints
    • 📈 Budget Pressure Layout: 5-column grid of cards

Slide 3: Persona

Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • “Sound Familiar?” headline
  • Patricia’s story in quote box
  • Stats: 47 complaints, $4,200, 15% over budget Visual: Professional woman illustration/photo

Slide 4: Possibilities

Background: White Content:

  • “What If You Could…” headline
  • 5 checkmark items in list Styling: Green checkmarks, slightly indented list

Slide 5: Solution Reveal

Background: White with gradient accent bar Content:

  • “95% Lower Cost” headline
  • 4 stat cards:
    • $5K per building
    • One dashboard
    • 20-30% savings
    • DIY installation Visual: Product image on right

Slide 6: Dashboard

Background: Light grey Content:

  • “See Everything. Control Everything.” headline
  • Dashboard screenshot (mockup)
  • 5 feature callouts around screenshot Layout: Screenshot centered, callouts as bubbles

Slide 7: AI Learning

Background: White Content:

  • “Not Schedules—Intelligence” headline
  • 4 AI capabilities (icons + text)
  • Savings graph: 10% → 20% → 30% Visual: Line chart showing improvement curve

Slide 8: Use Case 1

Background: White Template: Before/After split Content:

  • “The 10 PM Complaint Call”
  • Left (Before): $350 emergency call
  • Right (After): 90 seconds, $0
  • Bottom: “$4,200/year saved” (large, pink)

Slide 9: Use Case 2

Background: Light grey Template: Alert mockup Content:

  • “Proactive Maintenance” headline
  • Alert notification graphic
  • Numbers: $800 vs $12,000
  • “$11,200 saved” callout

Slide 10: Use Case 3

Background: White Template: Timeline Content:

  • “Automated Guest Experience” headline
  • Horizontal timeline: 2:30 PM → Check-in → Checkout
  • Auto-actions at each step
  • “$6,400/year per property” callout

Slide 11: Products

Background: Light grey Content:

  • “128 Products. One Vendor.” headline
  • 8-cell grid with categories
  • Each cell: Icon + Name + Count Styling: White cards with shadow

Slide 12: ROI Calculator

Background: White Content:

  • “See Your Savings” headline
  • Calculator-style layout with inputs/outputs
  • Example: 20 buildings × $2K × 25% = $120K
  • “Payback: 4-8 months” callout Visual: Calculator graphic or form styling

Slide 13: Timeline

Background: Light grey Template: Horizontal timeline Content:

  • “From Purchase to ROI: 30 Days” headline
  • 4 week markers with milestones
  • Comparison bar: HeyZack vs Traditional (6-12 mo) Visual: Timeline with progress indicators

Slide 14: Summary

Background: White Template: Two-column comparison Content:

  • “The Bottom Line” headline
  • Left column: What You Get (✓)
  • Right column: What You Avoid (✗)
  • Bottom: “30-day money-back guarantee” badge

Slide 15: CTA

Background: Gradient (#243984 → #E82F89) Content:

  • “Ready to Transform Your Portfolio?” (white)
  • 3 CTA options (Assessment / Pilot / Demo)
  • Contact info
  • Logo (white) Styling: High contrast, clear action

Design Guidelines

Layout

  • Margins: 80px all sides
  • Grid: 12-column for flexibility
  • Alignment: Left-align body text, center headlines optionally

Visual Hierarchy

  1. Headline (largest, brand blue)
  2. Key data (large numbers, pink accent)
  3. Supporting text (regular weight, black)
  4. Captions/labels (small, muted)
